subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network under the pressure of the party's intimidation.
source_quote: Under the pressure of the party's intimidation, her story of being an innocent traveler quickly unraveled, and she confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network.

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum turned invisible and attempted to flee into the darkness.
source_quote: Thera turned invisible and fled into the darkness

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought regarded the party with cold amusement.
source_quote: regarded them with cold amusement

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought declared that he had been waiting for the party for a very long time.
source_quote: declared that he had been waiting for them for a very long time

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought identified Bramgrim through his mind-reading as the greatest magical threat.
source_quote: whom he had identified through his mind-reading as the greatest magical threat

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought realized his defeat was imminent.
source_quote: Sensing his imminent defeat

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought vowed that he and Graz'zt would have their revenge.
source_quote: this was not over, and both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz hoped never to see the party again.
source_quote: he hoped never to see them again

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was certain that if he saw the party again, it would be because they were coming to save him.
source_quote: if he did, he was certain it would be because they were coming to save him

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana listened with great interest as the party floated the idea of starting a business in the city.
source_quote: she listened with great interest as the party floated the idea of starting a business in the city

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana implied that any business under her patronage would thrive.
source_quote: any business under her patronage would thrive

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana implied that any venture without her support would find the city a very difficult place to operate.
source_quote: any venture without her support would find the city a very difficult place to operate

subject: The party
fact: The party understood the message clearly.
source_quote: The party understood the message clearly

subject: The party
fact: The party left the dinner without signing anything.
source_quote: left the dinner without signing anything

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur privately reflected on his secret past as the 'Phantom Thief' while maintaining his current cover as a simple gnome artificer.
source_quote: Felkur privately reflects on his secret past as the 'Phantom Thief' while maintaining his current cover as a simple gnome artificer

subject: The group
fact: The group realized Isthana views them as powerful assets and insurance for the city's protection.
source_quote: The group realizes Isthana views them as powerful assets and insurance for the city's protection

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana wanted to co-opt the party into the existing power structure.
source_quote: wanting to co-opt them into the existing power structure

subject: The party
fact: The party decided to bypass the suspicious chest since they already had enough brains to open the sealed doors.
source_quote: ultimately deciding to bypass it since they already have enough brains to open the sealed doors

subject: The party
fact: The party wisely chose to leave the suspicious chest alone.
source_quote: one the party wisely chose to leave alone

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles and dropped them to the ground.
source_quote: he severed his own tentacles, dropped them to the ground

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought vanished in a flash of planar magic, escaping to another dimension entirely.
source_quote: vanished in a flash of planar magic, escaping to another dimension entirely

subject: The party's business
fact: The door remained open for future arrangements regarding the party's business in Hillsfar.
source_quote: the door remained open for future arrangements
